description:
A clinic pharmacist needs to add a new medication to the LibreHealth EHR drug inventory/formulary system. Log in to LibreHealth EHR (Username: admin, Password: password) and add the following drug to the inventory:

- Drug Name: Metformin HCl 500mg
- NDC Number: 00093-7214-01
- Drug Form: Tablet
- Route of Administration: Oral
- Dosage (Size): 500
- Unit: mg
